name: Suraj Gola
bio: Passionate full-stack developer with expertise in web technologies and cloud solutions. 4+ years of experience building scalable applications using modern tech stacks.
objective: To leverage technical expertise in building innovative, scalable web applications while contributing to team growth and creating meaningful user experiences.
aboutHtml:
I'm a full-stack developer passionate about creating elegant solutions to complex problems. With 4+ years of experience, I specialize in modern web technologies and have contributed to multiple successful projects.

When I'm not coding, I enjoy exploring new technologies, mentoring junior developers, and contributing to open-source projects.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with payment integration, user authentication, and inventory management. Built with React and Node.js.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: Collaborative task management application with real-time updates. Features include kanban boards, team collaboration, and notifications.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard displaying business metrics with interactive charts and data visualization.

sections.title: Summary
sections.content: Experienced full-stack developer with a proven track record of delivering high-quality web solutions. Strong technical skills combined with excellent communication abilities.

sections.title: Key Achievements
sections.content:
• Architected and launched 5+ production applications
• Improved system performance by 40% through optimization
• Led team of 3 junior developers
• Implemented automated testing (90% coverage)
• Reduced deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes with CI/CD
